name: Braintrust OTEL Exporter
description: Exports OpenClaw diagnostics and conversation hooks as Braintrust-shaped OTLP spans for observability and eval-grade trace capture.

raw.description: Emit sessionKey/sessionId/runId as raw values. Default true (v0.3.1+).

hash.description: Emit sessionKey/sessionId/runId as SHA-256(salt + id) truncated to 16 hex chars. Default false (v0.3.1+). Set true for client-facing deployments where sessionKey carries PII.

hashSaltSecretRef.description: Env var name holding the salt used when hash is true. Defaults to BRAINTRUST_SESSION_HASH_SALT.

enabled.description: When true, captures raw LLM prompts, assistant outputs, tool args, and tool results into Braintrust spans. Default false. Only safe on internal/admin-only Braintrust instances.

versioning.description: Operator-supplied labels that travel on every span as top-level braintrust.metadata.* so promoted dataset examples carry them. openclaw_version is read automatically from the resolved openclaw package and does not need to be set here.
